reason: All steps executed successfully - agent responded to math question with correct answer containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Success. App loaded with sidebar showing available agents.
Clicked on agent "QA-20260707-011645-jl0l" in sidebar — Success. Agent detail page loaded showing agent name and status.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Success. Agent status displayed as "idle".
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Success. Message typed in input field and sent button clicked.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Success. Agent responded in approximately 1 second.
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Success. Agent's response clearly states "2 + 2 = 4" which contains the required "4".
